text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem treatment-line-cs

This case-sensitive code system http://hl7.org/fhir/us/codex-mopa/CodeSystem/treatment-line-cs defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
1L First-lineThe first line of systemic anti-cancer therapy for this indication.
2L Second-lineThe second line of systemic anti-cancer therapy; administered after first-line therapy failure, progression, or intolerance.
3L-plus Third-line or laterThe third or any subsequent line of systemic anti-cancer therapy.
maintenance MaintenanceMaintenance therapy administered to prolong response after induction or consolidation treatment.

name: TreatmentLineCS
title: Treatment Line Code System
description:
Ordinal codes representing the line of systemic anti-cancer therapy.
These codes are used in the TreatmentLineVS value set and on the LineOfTherapyObservation
and regimen profiles.

**mCODE Migration Candidate** — These codes are proposed for adoption in mCODE STU5
or as a SNOMED CT extension request. Once standard codes are available, this code
system should be deprecated.
purpose:
mCODE Migration Candidate — proposed for adoption in mCODE STU5 or as a SNOMED CT
extension request. Once standard codes are available this code system will be deprecated.
It is NOT intended to be a permanent artifact of this IG. See the mCODE Gap Proposals page
for the migration plan.

concept.definition: The first line of systemic anti-cancer therapy for this indication.
The second line of systemic anti-cancer therapy; administered after first-line therapy failure, progression, or intolerance.
The third or any subsequent line of systemic anti-cancer therapy.
Maintenance therapy administered to prolong response after induction or consolidation treatment.
